description: Latest AI news curated from digg.com/ai — researcher-endorsed stories with local snapshot history and endorser pivots no website surface provides.

tools.name: stories_get
tools.description: Fetch full detail for a single AI story by its cluster ID. Returns headline, description, source URL, publish/modify times, and the list of endorsers (researchers and journalists who shared it). Required: cluster_id.

params.name: cluster_id
params.description: The cluster ID (e.g., '8eee35ea-eb73-4291-b803-e7ed89df3fba') or short slug (e.g., '0aeiof5t') from the story URL.

tools.name: stories_list
tools.description: List the latest AI stories curated on digg.com/ai. Returns a ranked feed of stories with headline, summary, age, likes, bookmarks, endorser count, and source link.

tools.name: topic_list
tools.description: List the latest stories for a given Digg topic. AI is the primary feed; other topics (technology, science, world, politics, business, sports, entertainment, news) work the same way but are secondary. Required: topic. Returns array of story.

params.name: topic
params.description: Topic slug. One of ai, technology, science, world, politics, business, sports, entertainment, news.
